829	with \texttt{skyscraperSheaf\_isFlasque} of
830	\cref{lem:skyscraperSheaf_isFlasque}). The chapter pins this
831	declaration under \cref{lem:H1_skyscraperSheaf_finrank_eq_zero_main}.
832	
833	\paragraph{Mathlib hooks.} The chapter depends on the following Mathlib
834	infrastructure (snapshot \texttt{b80f227}), all of which is already
835	consumed elsewhere in the project: the enough-injectives instance for
836	\(\mathrm{Sheaf}\;J\;(\Module \bar k)\) (the same instance that backs
837	the project's \(\HModule \bar k\) construction in
838	\cref{chap:Cohomology_StructureSheafModuleK}); the long-exact-sequence
839	of \(\Ext\) at \(\HModule \bar k\) carrier level
840	(\texttt{Abelian.Ext.covariantSequence}, the same LES used by the
841	\(\chi\)-additivity lemma of
842	\cref{chap:RiemannRoch_RRFormula}); the Mathlib API on
843	\(\mathtt{TopCat.Presheaf.SkyscraperSheaf}\) and its presheaf
844	description \(\mathtt{skyscraperPresheaf}\). The chapter does not
845	introduce any new \texttt{import} beyond what
846	\texttt{RRFormula.lean} already pulls.
847	
848	\paragraph{Downstream consumers.} Two consumers depend on the chapter's
849	main output \cref{lem:H1_skyscraperSheaf_finrank_eq_zero_main}:
850	\begin{itemize}
851	  \item \cref{chap:RiemannRoch_RRFormula}'s parent lemma
852	    \texttt{eulerCharacteristic\_skyscraperSheaf} consumes it to close
853	    the H\(^1\) half of \(\chi(k(P)) = 1\); this is the Lane H
854	    substrate input that the iter-188 strategy revision named.
855	  \item \cref{chap:RiemannRoch_OCofP} (the \texttt{RR.3} chapter) uses
856	    the same vanishing as part of its long-exact-sequence chain for the
857	    structural short exact sequence
858	    \(0 \to \mathcal O_C \to \mathcal O_C([P]) \to k(P) \to 0\);
859	    combined with the genus-\(0\) input
860	    \(\dim H^1(C, \mathcal O_C) = 0\) this delivers
861	    \(\dim H^0(C, \mathcal O_C([P])) = 2\), the non-constant-section
862	    output of \texttt{RR.3}.
863	\end{itemize}
864	
865	\section{Out of scope}
866	
867	The following items lie outside this chapter and are scheduled into
868	sibling sub-builds:
869	\begin{itemize}
870	  \item \emph{General coherent-sheaf cohomology vanishing.} Higher
871	    cohomology vanishing for general coherent sheaves on a curve
872	    requires Grothendieck vanishing on a one-dimensional scheme
873	    (Hartshorne~III.2.7), which the chapter does \emph{not} use; the
874	    chapter is narrowly tailored to the flasque/skyscraper case
875	    \(H^1(C, k(P)) = 0\) that the genus-\(0\) critical path needs.
876	  \item \emph{Serre duality for curves.} The general-\(g\) Riemann--Roch
877	    statement \(\ell(D) - \ell(K - D) = \deg(D) + 1 - g\) routes through
878	    Serre duality \(H^1(C, \mathcal L) \cong H^0(C, \omega_C \otimes
879	    \mathcal L^{-1})^*\); Mathlib has neither the dualizing sheaf
880	    \(\omega_C\) on a scheme nor the duality theorem. The chapter
881	    sidesteps duality entirely by using flasqueness directly (the
882	    Hartshorne~III~\S2 order of presentation, not the
883	    Hartshorne~III~\S7 one).
884	  \item \emph{The \(H^0\) half of \(\chi(k(P)) = 1\).} The
885	    one-dimensionality identification \(\dim H^0(C, k(P)) = 1\) is the
886	    sibling substrate lemma
887	    REF of
888	    \cref{chap:RiemannRoch_RRFormula}, closed axiom-clean iter-188
889	    against the project's four-step \(\bar k\)-linear-equivalence chain.
890	    The present chapter is the complementary H\(^1\) half.
891	\end{itemize}

8	public import Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Sites.Sheafification
9	public import Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Sites.DenseSubsite.SheafEquiv
10	/-!
11	
12	# The constant sheaf
13	
14	We define the constant sheaf functor (the sheafification of the constant presheaf)
15	`constantSheaf : D ⥤ Sheaf J D` and prove that it is left adjoint to evaluation at a terminal
16	object (see `constantSheafAdj`).
17	
18	We also define a predicate on sheaves, `Sheaf.IsConstant`, saying that a sheaf is in the
19	essential image of the constant sheaf functor.
20	
21	## Main results
22	
23	* `Sheaf.isConstant_iff_isIso_counit_app`: Provided that the constant sheaf functor is fully
24	  faithful, a sheaf is constant if and only if the counit of the constant sheaf adjunction applied
25	  to it is an isomorphism.
26	
27	* `Sheaf.isConstant_iff_of_equivalence` : The property of a sheaf of being constant is invariant
28	  under equivalence of sheaf categories.
29	
30	* `Sheaf.isConstant_iff_forget` : Given a "forgetful" functor `U : D ⥤ B` a sheaf `F : Sheaf J D` is
31	  constant if and only if the sheaf given by postcomposition with `U` is constant.
32	-/
33	
34	@[expose] public section
35	
36	namespace CategoryTheory
37	
38	open Limits Opposite Category Functor Sheaf Adjunction
39	
40	variable {C : Type*} [Category* C] (J : GrothendieckTopology C)
41	variable (D : Type*) [Category* D]
42	
43	set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
44	/-- The constant presheaf functor is left adjoint to evaluation at a terminal object. -/
45	@[simps! unit_app counit_app_app]
46	noncomputable def constantPresheafAdj {T : C} (hT : IsTerminal T) :
47	    Functor.const Cᵒᵖ ⊣ (evaluation Cᵒᵖ D).obj (op T) where
48	  unit := (Functor.constCompEvaluationObj D (op T)).hom
49	  counit := {
50	    app := fun F => {
51	      app := fun ⟨X⟩ => F.map (IsTerminal.from hT X).op
52	      naturality := fun _ _ _ => by
53	        simp only [Functor.comp_obj, Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.id_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
54	          Category.id_comp, ← Functor.map_comp]
55	        congr
56	        simp }
57	    naturality := by intros; ext; simp /- Note: `aesop` works but is kind of slow -/ }
58	
59	variable [HasWeakSheafify J D]
60	
61	/--
62	The functor which maps an object of `D` to the constant sheaf at that object, i.e. the
63	sheafification of the constant presheaf.
64	-/
65	noncomputable def constantSheaf : D ⥤ Sheaf J D := Functor.const Cᵒᵖ ⋙ (presheafToSheaf J D)
66	
67	/-- The constant sheaf functor is left adjoint to evaluation at a terminal object. -/
68	@[simps! counit_app]
69	noncomputable def constantSheafAdj {T : C} (hT : IsTerminal T) :
70	    constantSheaf J D ⊣ (sheafSections J D).obj (op T) :=
71	  (constantPresheafAdj D hT).comp (sheafificationAdjunction J D)
72	
73	variable {D}
74	
75	namespace Sheaf
76	
77	/--
78	A sheaf is constant if it is in the essential image of the constant sheaf functor.
79	-/
80	class IsConstant (F : Sheaf J D) : Prop where
81	  mem_essImage : (constantSheaf J D).essImage F
82	
83	lemma mem_essImage_of_isConstant (F : Sheaf J D) [IsConstant J F] :
84	    (constantSheaf J D).essImage F :=
85	  IsConstant.mem_essImage
86	
87	lemma isConstant_congr {F G : Sheaf J D} (i : F ≅ G) [IsConstant J F] : IsConstant J G where
88	  mem_essImage := essImage.ofIso i F.mem_essImage_of_isConstant
89	
90	lemma isConstant_of_iso {F : Sheaf J D} {X : D} (i : F ≅ (constantSheaf J D).obj X) :
91	    IsConstant J F := ⟨_, ⟨i.symm⟩⟩
92	
93	lemma isConstant_iff_mem_essImage {L : D ⥤ Sheaf J D} {T : C} (hT : IsTerminal T)
94	    (adj : L ⊣ (sheafSections J D).obj ⟨T⟩)
95	    (F : Sheaf J D) : IsConstant J F ↔ L.essImage F := by
96	  rw [essImage_eq_of_natIso (adj.leftAdjointUniq (constantSheafAdj J D hT))]
97	  exact ⟨fun ⟨h⟩ ↦ h, fun h ↦ ⟨h⟩⟩
98	
99	set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
100	lemma isConstant_of_isIso_counit_app (F : Sheaf J D) [HasTerminal C]
101	    [IsIso <| (constantSheafAdj J D terminalIsTerminal).counit.app F] : IsConstant J F where
102	  mem_essImage := ⟨_, ⟨asIso <| (constantSheafAdj J D terminalIsTerminal).counit.app F⟩⟩
103	
104	instance [(constantSheaf J D).Faithful] [(constantSheaf J D).Full] (F : Sheaf J D)
105	    [IsConstant J F] {T : C} (hT : IsTerminal T) :
106	    IsIso ((constantSheafAdj J D hT).counit.app F) := by
107	  rw [isIso_counit_app_iff_mem_essImage]
108	  exact F.mem_essImage_of_isConstant
109	
110	set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
111	/--
112	If the constant sheaf functor is fully faithful, then a sheaf is constant if and only if the
113	counit of the constant sheaf adjunction applied to it is an isomorphism.
114	-/
115	lemma isConstant_iff_isIso_counit_app [(constantSheaf J D).Faithful] [(constantSheaf J D).Full]
116	    (F : Sheaf J D) {T : C} (hT : IsTerminal T) :
117	      IsConstant J F ↔ (IsIso <| (constantSheafAdj J D hT).counit.app F) :=
118	  ⟨fun _ ↦ inferInstance, fun _ ↦ ⟨_, ⟨asIso <| (constantSheafAdj J D hT).counit.app F⟩⟩⟩
119	
120	/--
121	A variant of `isConstant_iff_isIso_counit_app` for a general left adjoint to evaluation at a
122	terminal object.
123	-/
124	lemma isConstant_iff_isIso_counit_app' {L : D ⥤ Sheaf J D} {T : C} (hT : IsTerminal T)
125	    (adj : L ⊣ (sheafSections J D).obj ⟨T⟩)
126	    [L.Faithful] [L.Full] (F : Sheaf J D) : IsConstant J F ↔ IsIso (adj.counit.app F) :=
127	  (isConstant_iff_mem_essImage J hT adj F).trans (isIso_counit_app_iff_mem_essImage adj).symm
128	
129	end Sheaf
130	
131	section Equivalence
132	variable {C' : Type*} [Category* C'] (K : GrothendieckTopology C') [HasWeakSheafify K D]
133	variable (G : C ⥤ C') [∀ (X : (C')ᵒᵖ), HasLimitsOfShape (StructuredArrow X G.op) D]
134	  [G.IsDenseSubsite J K] {T : C} (hT : IsTerminal T) (hT' : IsTerminal (G.obj T))
135	
136	open IsDenseSubsite
137	
138	variable (D) in
139	/--
140	The constant sheaf functor commutes up to isomorphism the equivalence of sheaf categories induced
141	by a dense subsite.
142	-/
143	noncomputable def equivCommuteConstant :
144	    constantSheaf J D ⋙ (sheafEquiv J K G D).functor ≅ constantSheaf K D :=
145	  ((constantSheafAdj J D hT).comp (sheafEquiv J K G D).toAdjunction).leftAdjointUniq
146	    (constantSheafAdj K D hT')
147	
148	variable (D) in
149	/--
150	The constant sheaf functor commutes up to isomorphism the inverse equivalence of sheaf categories
151	induced by a dense subsite.
152	-/
153	noncomputable def equivCommuteConstant' :
154	    constantSheaf J D ≅ constantSheaf K D ⋙ (sheafEquiv J K G D).inverse :=
155	  isoWhiskerLeft (constantSheaf J D) (sheafEquiv J K G D).unitIso ≪≫
156	    isoWhiskerRight (equivCommuteConstant J D K G hT hT') (sheafEquiv J K G D).inverse
157	
158	/- TODO: find suitable assumptions for proving generalizations of `equivCommuteConstant` and
159	`equivCommuteConstant'` above, to commute `constantSheaf` with pullback/pushforward of sheaves. -/
160	
161	include hT hT' in
162	/--
163	The property of a sheaf of being constant is invariant under equivalence of sheaf
164	categories.
165	-/
166	lemma Sheaf.isConstant_iff_of_equivalence (F : Sheaf K D) :
167	    ((sheafEquiv J K G D).inverse.obj F).IsConstant J ↔ IsConstant K F := by
168	  constructor
169	  · exact fun ⟨Y, ⟨i⟩⟩ ↦ ⟨_, ⟨(equivCommuteConstant J D K G hT hT').symm.app _ ≪≫
170	      (sheafEquiv J K G D).functor.mapIso i ≪≫ (sheafEquiv J K G D).counitIso.app _⟩⟩
171	  · exact fun ⟨Y, ⟨i⟩⟩ ↦ ⟨_, ⟨(equivCommuteConstant' J D K G hT hT').app _ ≪≫
172	      (sheafEquiv J K G D).inverse.mapIso i⟩⟩
173	
174	end Equivalence
175	
176	section Forget
177	
178	variable {B : Type*} [Category* B] (U : D ⥤ B) [HasWeakSheafify J B]
179	  [J.PreservesSheafification U] [J.HasSheafCompose U] (F : Sheaf J D)
180	
181	/--
182	The constant sheaf functor commutes with `sheafCompose J U` up to isomorphism, provided that `U`
183	preserves sheafification.
184	-/
185	noncomputable def constantCommuteCompose :
186	    constantSheaf J D ⋙ sheafCompose J U ≅ U ⋙ constantSheaf J B :=
187	  (isoWhiskerLeft (const Cᵒᵖ)
188	    (sheafComposeNatIso J U (sheafificationAdjunction J D) (sheafificationAdjunction J B)).symm) ≪≫
189	      isoWhiskerRight (compConstIso _ _).symm _
190	
191	lemma constantCommuteCompose_hom_app_hom (X : D) : ((constantCommuteCompose J U).hom.app X).hom =
192	    (sheafifyComposeIso J U ((const Cᵒᵖ).obj X)).inv ≫ sheafifyMap J (constComp Cᵒᵖ X U).hom := rfl
193	
194	@[deprecated (since := "2026-03-05")]
195	alias constantCommuteCompose_hom_app_val := constantCommuteCompose_hom_app_hom
196	
197	set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
198	/-- The counit of `constantSheafAdj` factors through the isomorphism `constantCommuteCompose`. -/
199	lemma constantSheafAdj_counit_w {T : C} (hT : IsTerminal T) :
200	    ((constantCommuteCompose J U).hom.app (F.obj.obj ⟨T⟩)) ≫
201	      ((constantSheafAdj J B hT).counit.app ((sheafCompose J U).obj F)) =
202	        ((sheafCompose J U).map ((constantSheafAdj J D hT).counit.app F)) := by
203	  apply Sheaf.hom_ext
204	  dsimp
205	  rw [constantCommuteCompose_hom_app_hom, assoc, Iso.inv_comp_eq]
206	  apply sheafify_hom_ext _ _ _ ((sheafCompose J U).obj F).property
207	  ext x
208	  simp [NatTrans.comp_app] -- simp [NatTrans.comp_app] to unfold some definitions
209	  simp [← map_comp, ← NatTrans.comp_app] -- simp [← NatTrans.comp_app] to simplify some compositions
210	
211	set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
212	lemma Sheaf.isConstant_of_forget [constantSheaf J D |>.Faithful] [constantSheaf J D |>.Full]
213	    [constantSheaf J B |>.Faithful] [constantSheaf J B |>.Full]
214	    [(sheafCompose J U).ReflectsIsomorphisms] [((sheafCompose J U).obj F).IsConstant J]
215	    {T : C} (hT : IsTerminal T) : F.IsConstant J := by
216	  have : IsIso ((sheafCompose J U).map ((constantSheafAdj J D hT).counit.app F)) := by
217	    rw [← constantSheafAdj_counit_w]
218	    infer_instance
219	  rw [F.isConstant_iff_isIso_counit_app (hT := hT)]
220	  exact isIso_of_reflects_iso _ (sheafCompose J U)
221	
222	instance [h : F.IsConstant J] : ((sheafCompose J U).obj F).IsConstant J := by
223	  obtain ⟨Y, ⟨i⟩⟩ := h
224	  exact ⟨U.obj Y, ⟨(fullyFaithfulSheafToPresheaf _ _).preimageIso
225	    (((sheafifyComposeIso J U ((const Cᵒᵖ).obj Y)).symm ≪≫
226	      (presheafToSheaf J B ⋙ sheafToPresheaf J B).mapIso (constComp Cᵒᵖ Y U)).symm ≪≫
227	        (sheafToPresheaf _ _).mapIso ((sheafCompose J U).mapIso i))⟩⟩
228	
229	lemma Sheaf.isConstant_iff_forget [constantSheaf J D |>.Faithful] [constantSheaf J D |>.Full]
230	    [constantSheaf J B |>.Faithful] [constantSheaf J B |>.Full]
231	      [(sheafCompose J U).ReflectsIsomorphisms] {T : C} (hT : IsTerminal T) :
232	        F.IsConstant J ↔ ((sheafCompose J U).obj F).IsConstant J :=
233	  ⟨fun _ ↦ inferInstance, fun _ ↦ Sheaf.isConstant_of_forget _ U F hT⟩
234	
235	end Forget
236	
237	end CategoryTheory

243:def skyscraperSheaf : Sheaf C X :=

1	/-
2	Copyright (c) 2022 Jujian Zhang. All rights reserved.
3	Released under Apache 2.0 license as described in the file LICENSE.
4	Authors: Jujian Zhang, Junyan Xu
5	-/
6	module
7	
8	public import Mathlib.Topology.Sheaves.PUnit
9	public import Mathlib.Topology.Sheaves.Stalks
10	public import Mathlib.Topology.Sheaves.Functors
11	
12	/-!
13	# Skyscraper (pre)sheaves
14	
15	A skyscraper (pre)sheaf `𝓕 : (Pre)Sheaf C X` is the (pre)sheaf with value `A` at point `p₀` that is
16	supported only at open sets contain `p₀`, i.e. `𝓕(U) = A` if `p₀ ∈ U` and `𝓕(U) = *` if `p₀ ∉ U`
17	where `*` is a terminal object of `C`. In terms of stalks, `𝓕` is supported at all specializations
18	of `p₀`, i.e. if `p₀ ⤳ x` then `𝓕ₓ ≅ A` and if `¬ p₀ ⤳ x` then `𝓕ₓ ≅ *`.
19	
20	## Main definitions
21	
22	* `skyscraperPresheaf`: `skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A` is the skyscraper presheaf at point `p₀` with
23	  value `A`.
24	* `skyscraperSheaf`: the skyscraper presheaf satisfies the sheaf condition.
25	
26	## Main statements
27	
28	* `skyscraperPresheafStalkOfSpecializes`: if `y ∈ closure {p₀}` then the stalk of
29	  `skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A` at `y` is `A`.
30	* `skyscraperPresheafStalkOfNotSpecializes`: if `y ∉ closure {p₀}` then the stalk of
31	  `skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A` at `y` is `*` the terminal object.
32	
33	TODO: generalize universe level when calculating stalks, after generalizing universe level of stalk.
34	TODO(@joelriou): refactor the definitions in this file so as to make them
35	particular cases of general constructions for points of sites from
36	`Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Sites/Point/Skyscraper.lean`.
37	
38	-/
39	
40	@[expose] public section
41	
42	noncomputable section
43	
44	open TopologicalSpace TopCat CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits Opposite
45	open scoped AlgebraicGeometry
46	
47	universe u v w
48	
49	variable {X : TopCat.{u}} (p₀ : X) [∀ U : Opens X, Decidable (p₀ ∈ U)]
50	
51	section
52	
53	variable {C : Type v} [Category.{w} C] [HasTerminal C] (A : C)
54	
55	/-- A skyscraper presheaf is a presheaf supported at a single point: if `p₀ ∈ X` is a specified
56	point, then the skyscraper presheaf `𝓕` with value `A` is defined by `U ↦ A` if `p₀ ∈ U` and
57	`U ↦ *` if `p₀ ∉ A` where `*` is some terminal object.
58	-/
59	@[simps]
60	def skyscraperPresheaf : Presheaf C X where
61	  obj U := if p₀ ∈ unop U then A else terminal C
62	  map {U V} i :=
63	    if h : p₀ ∈ unop V then eqToHom <| by rw [if_pos h, if_pos (by simpa using i.unop.le h)]
64	    else ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).from _
65	  map_id U :=
66	    (em (p₀ ∈ U.unop)).elim (fun h => dif_pos h) fun h =>
67	      ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).hom_ext _ _
68	  map_comp {U V W} iVU iWV := by
69	    by_cases hW : p₀ ∈ unop W
70	    · have hV : p₀ ∈ unop V := leOfHom iWV.unop hW
71	      simp only [dif_pos hW, dif_pos hV, eqToHom_trans]
72	    · dsimp; rw [dif_neg hW]; apply ((if_neg hW).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).hom_ext
73	
74	theorem skyscraperPresheaf_eq_pushforward
75	    [hd : ∀ U : Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u + 1}), Decidable (PUnit.unit ∈ U)] :
76	    skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A =
77	      (ofHom (ContinuousMap.const (TopCat.of PUnit) p₀)) _*
78	        skyscraperPresheaf (X := TopCat.of PUnit) PUnit.unit A := by
79	  convert_to @skyscraperPresheaf X p₀ (fun U => hd <| (Opens.map <| ofHom <|
80	      ContinuousMap.const _ p₀).obj U)
81	    C _ _ A = _ <;> congr
82	
83	/-- Taking skyscraper presheaf at a point is functorial: `c ↦ skyscraper p₀ c` defines a functor by
84	sending every `f : a ⟶ b` to the natural transformation `α` defined as: `α(U) = f : a ⟶ b` if
85	`p₀ ∈ U` and the unique morphism to a terminal object in `C` if `p₀ ∉ U`.
86	-/
87	@[simps]
88	def SkyscraperPresheafFunctor.map' {a b : C} (f : a ⟶ b) :
89	    skyscraperPresheaf p₀ a ⟶ skyscraperPresheaf p₀ b where
90	  app U :=
91	    if h : p₀ ∈ U.unop then eqToHom (if_pos h) ≫ f ≫ eqToHom (if_pos h).symm
92	    else ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).from _
93	  naturality U V i := by
94	    simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map]
95	    by_cases hV : p₀ ∈ V.unop
96	    · have hU : p₀ ∈ U.unop := leOfHom i.unop hV
97	      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_obj, hU, hV, ↓reduceDIte, eqToHom_trans_assoc, Category.assoc,
98	        eqToHom_trans]
99	    · apply ((if_neg hV).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).hom_ext
100	
101	theorem SkyscraperPresheafFunctor.map'_id {a : C} :
102	    SkyscraperPresheafFunctor.map' p₀ (𝟙 a) = 𝟙 _ := by
103	  ext U
104	  simp only [SkyscraperPresheafFunctor.map'_app]; split_ifs <;> cat_disch
105	
106	theorem SkyscraperPresheafFunctor.map'_comp {a b c : C} (f : a ⟶ b) (g : b ⟶ c) :
107	    SkyscraperPresheafFunctor.map' p₀ (f ≫ g) =
108	      SkyscraperPresheafFunctor.map' p₀ f ≫ SkyscraperPresheafFunctor.map' p₀ g := by
109	  ext U
110	  simp only [SkyscraperPresheafFunctor.map'_app]
111	  split_ifs with h <;> cat_disch
112	
113	/-- Taking skyscraper presheaf at a point is functorial: `c ↦ skyscraper p₀ c` defines a functor by
114	sending every `f : a ⟶ b` to the natural transformation `α` defined as: `α(U) = f : a ⟶ b` if
115	`p₀ ∈ U` and the unique morphism to a terminal object in `C` if `p₀ ∉ U`.
116	-/
117	@[simps]
118	def skyscraperPresheafFunctor : C ⥤ Presheaf C X where
119	  obj := skyscraperPresheaf p₀
120	  map := SkyscraperPresheafFunctor.map' p₀
121	  map_id _ := SkyscraperPresheafFunctor.map'_id p₀
122	  map_comp := SkyscraperPresheafFunctor.map'_comp p₀
123	
124	end
125	
126	section
127	
128	-- In this section, we calculate the stalks for skyscraper presheaves.
129	-- We need to restrict universe level.
130	variable {C : Type v} [Category.{u} C] (A : C) [HasTerminal C]
131	
132	set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
133	/-- The cocone at `A` for the stalk functor of `skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A` when `y ∈ closure {p₀}`
134	-/
135	@[simps]
136	def skyscraperPresheafCoconeOfSpecializes {y : X} (h : p₀ ⤳ y) :
137	    Cocone ((OpenNhds.inclusion y).op ⋙ skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A) where
138	  pt := A
139	  ι :=
140	    { app := fun U => eqToHom <| if_pos <| h.mem_open U.unop.1.2 U.unop.2
141	      naturality := fun U V inc => by
142	        change dite _ _ _ ≫ _ = _; rw [dif_pos]
143	        swap
144	        · exact h.mem_open V.unop.1.2 V.unop.2
145	        · simp only [Functor.comp_obj, Functor.op_obj, skyscraperPresheaf_obj, unop_op,
146	            Functor.const_obj_obj, eqToHom_trans, Functor.const_obj_map, Category.comp_id] }
147	
148	set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
149	/--
150	The cocone at `A` for the stalk functor of `skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A` when `y ∈ closure {p₀}` is a
151	colimit
152	-/
153	noncomputable def skyscraperPresheafCoconeIsColimitOfSpecializes {y : X} (h : p₀ ⤳ y) :
154	    IsColimit (skyscraperPresheafCoconeOfSpecializes p₀ A h) where
155	  desc c := eqToHom (if_pos trivial).symm ≫ c.ι.app (op ⊤)
156	  fac c U := by
157	    dsimp
158	    rw [← c.w (homOfLE <| (le_top : unop U ≤ _)).op]
159	    change _ ≫ _ ≫ dite _ _ _ ≫ _ = _
160	    rw [dif_pos]
161	    · simp only [eqToHom_trans_assoc,
162	        eqToHom_refl, Category.id_comp, op_unop]
163	    · exact h.mem_open U.unop.1.2 U.unop.2
164	  uniq c f h := by
165	    dsimp
166	    rw [← h, skyscraperPresheafCoconeOfSpecializes_ι_app, eqToHom_trans_assoc, eqToHom_refl,
167	      Category.id_comp]
168	
169	/-- If `y ∈ closure {p₀}`, then the stalk of `skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A` at `y` is `A`.
170	-/
171	noncomputable def skyscraperPresheafStalkOfSpecializes [HasColimits C] {y : X} (h : p₀ ⤳ y) :
172	    (skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A).stalk y ≅ A :=
173	  colimit.isoColimitCocone ⟨_, skyscraperPresheafCoconeIsColimitOfSpecializes p₀ A h⟩
174	
175	@[reassoc (attr := simp)]
176	lemma germ_skyscraperPresheafStalkOfSpecializes_hom [HasColimits C] {y : X} (h : p₀ ⤳ y) (U hU) :
177	    (skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A).germ U y hU ≫
178	      (skyscraperPresheafStalkOfSpecializes p₀ A h).hom = eqToHom (if_pos (h.mem_open U.2 hU)) :=
179	  colimit.isoColimitCocone_ι_hom _ _
180	
181	/-- The cocone at `*` for the stalk functor of `skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A` when `y ∉ closure {p₀}`
182	-/
183	@[simps]
184	def skyscraperPresheafCocone (y : X) :
185	    Cocone ((OpenNhds.inclusion y).op ⋙ skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A) where
186	  pt := terminal C
187	  ι :=
188	    { app := fun _ => terminal.from _
189	      naturality := fun _ _ _ => terminalIsTerminal.hom_ext _ _ }
190	
191	set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
192	/--
193	The cocone at `*` for the stalk functor of `skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A` when `y ∉ closure {p₀}` is a
194	colimit
195	-/
196	noncomputable def skyscraperPresheafCoconeIsColimitOfNotSpecializes {y : X} (h : ¬p₀ ⤳ y) :
197	    IsColimit (skyscraperPresheafCocone p₀ A y) :=
198	  let h1 : ∃ U : OpenNhds y, p₀ ∉ U.1 :=
199	    let ⟨U, ho, h₀, hy⟩ := not_specializes_iff_exists_open.mp h
200	    ⟨⟨⟨U, ho⟩, h₀⟩, hy⟩
201	  { desc := fun c => eqToHom (if_neg h1.choose_spec).symm ≫ c.ι.app (op h1.choose)
202	    fac := fun c U => by
203	      change _ = c.ι.app (op U.unop)
204	      simp only [← c.w (homOfLE <| @inf_le_left _ _ h1.choose U.unop).op, ←
205	        c.w (homOfLE <| @inf_le_right _ _ h1.choose U.unop).op, ← Category.assoc]
206	      congr 1
207	      refine ((if_neg ?_).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).hom_ext _ _
208	      exact fun h => h1.choose_spec h.1
209	    uniq := fun c f H => by
210	      dsimp
211	      rw [← Category.id_comp f, ← H, ← Category.assoc]
212	      congr 1; apply terminalIsTerminal.hom_ext }
213	
214	/-- If `y ∉ closure {p₀}`, then the stalk of `skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A` at `y` is isomorphic to a
215	terminal object.
216	-/
217	noncomputable def skyscraperPresheafStalkOfNotSpecializes [HasColimits C] {y : X} (h : ¬p₀ ⤳ y) :
218	    (skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A).stalk y ≅ terminal C :=
219	  colimit.isoColimitCocone ⟨_, skyscraperPresheafCoconeIsColimitOfNotSpecializes _ A h⟩
220	
221	/-- If `y ∉ closure {p₀}`, then the stalk of `skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A` at `y` is a terminal object
222	-/
223	def skyscraperPresheafStalkOfNotSpecializesIsTerminal [HasColimits C] {y : X} (h : ¬p₀ ⤳ y) :
224	    IsTerminal ((skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A).stalk y) :=
225	  IsTerminal.ofIso terminalIsTerminal <| (skyscraperPresheafStalkOfNotSpecializes _ _ h).symm
226	
227	theorem skyscraperPresheaf_isSheaf : (skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A).IsSheaf := by
228	  classical exact
229	    (Presheaf.isSheaf_iso_iff (eqToIso <| skyscraperPresheaf_eq_pushforward p₀ A)).mpr <|
230	      (Sheaf.pushforward_sheaf_of_sheaf _
231	        (Presheaf.isSheaf_on_punit_of_isTerminal _ (by
232	          dsimp [skyscraperPresheaf]
233	          rw [if_neg]
234	          · exact terminalIsTerminal
235	          · #adaptation_note /-- 2024-03-24
236	            Previously the universe annotation was not needed here. -/
237	            exact Set.notMem_empty PUnit.unit.{u + 1})))
238	
239	/--
240	The skyscraper presheaf supported at `p₀` with value `A` is the sheaf that assigns `A` to all opens
241	`U` that contain `p₀` and assigns `*` otherwise.
242	-/
243	def skyscraperSheaf : Sheaf C X :=
244	  ⟨skyscraperPresheaf p₀ A, skyscraperPresheaf_isSheaf _ _⟩
245	
246	/-- Taking skyscraper sheaf at a point is functorial: `c ↦ skyscraper p₀ c` defines a functor by
247	sending every `f : a ⟶ b` to the natural transformation `α` defined as: `α(U) = f : a ⟶ b` if
248	`p₀ ∈ U` and the unique morphism to a terminal object in `C` if `p₀ ∉ U`.
249	-/
250	def skyscraperSheafFunctor : C ⥤ Sheaf C X where
251	  obj c := skyscraperSheaf p₀ c
252	  map f := ObjectProperty.homMk <| (skyscraperPresheafFunctor p₀).map f
253	  map_id _ := Sheaf.hom_ext <| (skyscraperPresheafFunctor p₀).map_id _
254	  map_comp _ _ := Sheaf.hom_ext <| (skyscraperPresheafFunctor p₀).map_comp _ _
255	
256	namespace StalkSkyscraperPresheafAdjunctionAuxs
257	
258	variable [HasColimits C]
259	
260	/-- If `f : 𝓕.stalk p₀ ⟶ c`, then a natural transformation `𝓕 ⟶ skyscraperPresheaf p₀ c` can be
261	defined by: `𝓕.germ p₀ ≫ f : 𝓕(U) ⟶ c` if `p₀ ∈ U` and the unique morphism to a terminal object
262	if `p₀ ∉ U`.
263	-/
264	@[simps]
265	def toSkyscraperPresheaf {𝓕 : Presheaf C X} {c : C} (f : 𝓕.stalk p₀ ⟶ c) :
266	    𝓕 ⟶ skyscraperPresheaf p₀ c where
267	  app U :=
268	    if h : p₀ ∈ U.unop then 𝓕.germ _ p₀ h ≫ f ≫ eqToHom (if_pos h).symm
269	    else ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).from _
270	  naturality U V inc := by

11	# Presheaves on `PUnit`
12	
13	Presheaves on `PUnit` satisfy sheaf condition iff its value at empty set is a terminal object.
14	-/
15	
16	public section
17	
18	
19	namespace TopCat.Presheaf
20	
21	universe u v w
22	
23	open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits TopCat Opposite
24	
25	variable {C : Type u} [Category.{v} C]
26	
27	theorem isSheaf_of_isTerminal_of_indiscrete {X : TopCat.{w}} (hind : X.str = ⊤) (F : Presheaf C X)
28	    (it : IsTerminal <| F.obj <| op ⊥) : F.IsSheaf := fun c U s hs => by
29	  have : IndiscreteTopology X := ⟨hind⟩
30	  obtain rfl | hne := eq_or_ne U ⊥
31	  · intro _ _
32	    rw [@existsUnique_iff_exists _ ⟨fun _ _ => _⟩]
33	    · refine ⟨it.from _, fun U hU hs => IsTerminal.hom_ext ?_ _ _⟩
34	      rwa [le_bot_iff.1 hU.le]
35	    · apply it.hom_ext
36	  · convert Presieve.isSheafFor_top (F ⋙ coyoneda.obj (@op C c))
37	    rw [Sieve.arrows_eq_top_iff, ← Sieve.id_mem_iff_eq_top]
38	    have := U.eq_bot_or_top.resolve_left hne
39	    subst this
40	    obtain he | ⟨⟨x⟩⟩ := isEmpty_or_nonempty X
41	    · exact (hne <| SetLike.ext'_iff.2 <| Set.univ_eq_empty_iff.2 he).elim
42	    obtain ⟨U, f, hf, hm⟩ := hs x _root_.trivial
43	    obtain rfl | rfl := U.eq_bot_or_top
44	    · cases hm
45	    · convert hf
46	
47	theorem isSheaf_iff_isTerminal_of_indiscrete {X : TopCat.{w}} (hind : X.str = ⊤)
48	    (F : Presheaf C X) : F.IsSheaf ↔ Nonempty (IsTerminal <| F.obj <| op ⊥) :=
49	  ⟨fun h => ⟨Sheaf.isTerminalOfEmpty ⟨F, h⟩⟩, fun ⟨it⟩ =>
50	    isSheaf_of_isTerminal_of_indiscrete hind F it⟩
51	
52	theorem isSheaf_on_punit_of_isTerminal (F : Presheaf C (TopCat.of PUnit))
53	    (it : IsTerminal <| F.obj <| op ⊥) : F.IsSheaf :=
54	  isSheaf_of_isTerminal_of_indiscrete (@Subsingleton.elim (TopologicalSpace PUnit) _ _ _) F it
55	
56	theorem isSheaf_on_punit_iff_isTerminal (F : Presheaf C (TopCat.of PUnit)) :
57	    F.IsSheaf ↔ Nonempty (IsTerminal <| F.obj <| op ⊥) :=
58	  ⟨fun h => ⟨Sheaf.isTerminalOfEmpty ⟨F, h⟩⟩, fun ⟨it⟩ => isSheaf_on_punit_of_isTerminal F it⟩
59	
60	end TopCat.Presheaf

import Mathlib
open CategoryTheory TopologicalSpace TopCat Opposite Limits

universe u
variable (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (A : ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
variable [(U : Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})) → Decidable (PUnit.unit ∈ U)]

-- Build inverse map at the presheaf level.
-- For each op U where U is an Opens of PUnit:
--  if PUnit.unit ∈ U: skyscraperPresheaf(op U) = A, and constantSheaf...val(op U) we map via adj.unit.
--  if not: skyscraperPresheaf(op U) = terminal, and constantSheaf...val(op U) is also terminal (by sheaf cond).
noncomputable def beta :
    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app ((Functor.const _).obj A)).app U
    · -- skyscraperPresheaf at op U is terminal, CS at op U is terminal (sheaf cond)
      let hsky_term : IsTerminal ((skyscraperPresheaf PUnit.unit A).obj U) := by
        rw [skyscraperPresheaf_obj, if_neg h]
        exact terminalIsTerminal
      -- We need a map from this terminal to CS.val.obj U; use anything.
      have hCS_term : IsTerminal (CS.val.obj U) := by
        have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
          rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with rfl | rfl
          · rfl
          · exfalso; exact h trivial
        rw [show U = op ⊥ from by rw [← hU]; rfl]
        exact TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEmpty CS
      exact hCS_term.from _
  · sorry

open CategoryTheory TopologicalSpace TopCat Opposite Limits

universe u
variable (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (A : ModuleCat.{u} kbar)

      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app ((Functor.const _).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _
  · -- naturality
    by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>
      -- V = ⊥, so CS.val.obj V is terminal
      have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hVbot).hom_ext _ _
    case pos =>
      have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      -- Both U and V contain PUnit.unit, so both must be ⊤
      -- skyscraperPresheaf.map = eqToHom (since p₀ ∈ V.unop)
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV]
      sorry

import Mathlib
open CategoryTheory TopologicalSpace TopCat Opposite Limits

universe u
variable (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (A : ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
variable [(U : Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})) → Decidable (PUnit.unit ∈ U)]

noncomputable def beta :
    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app ((Functor.const _).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _
  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>
      have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hVbot).hom_ext _ _
    case pos =>
      have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      -- Both branches of the dif select the eqToHom + adj.unit
      simp only [dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU]
      -- Use adj.unit naturality
      have hnat := ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app ((Functor.const _).obj A)).naturality i
      simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.const_obj_map, Category.id_comp] at hnat
      -- goal: eqToHom_U ≫ adj.unit_U ≫ CS.val.map i = skyscraperPresheaf.map i ≫ eqToHom_V ≫ adj.unit_V
      -- adj.unit_U ≫ CS.val.map i = adj.unit_V via hnat (after rfl on (Functor.const).map i = 𝟙)
      rw [Category.assoc, hnat]
      -- now: eqToHom_U ≫ adj.unit_V = skyscraperPresheaf.map i ≫ eqToHom_V ≫ adj.unit_V
      -- The skyscraperPresheaf.map in the pos case is eqToHom
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV]
      rw [← Category.assoc, eqToHom_trans]

  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app ((Functor.const _).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _
  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>
      have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial

    case pos =>

      simp only [dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU]
      have hnat := ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app ((Functor.const _).obj A)).naturality i
      -- LHS: skyscraperPresheaf.map ≫ (eqToHom_V ≫ adj.unit_V)
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV]
      -- hnat: ((Functor.const).obj A).map i ≫ adj.unit_V = adj.unit_U ≫ sheafified.map i
      -- ((Functor.const).obj A).map i = 𝟙 A
      change _ = _ ≫ ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app ((Functor.const _).obj A)).app U ≫

import Mathlib
open CategoryTheory TopologicalSpace TopCat Opposite Limits

universe u
variable (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (A : ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
variable [(U : Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})) → Decidable (PUnit.unit ∈ U)]

noncomputable def beta :
    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app ((Functor.const _).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _
  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>
      have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hVbot).hom_ext _ _
    case pos =>
      have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU]
      have hnat := ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app
        ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).naturality i
      simp only [Functor.id_obj, Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
        Category.id_comp] at hnat
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV]
      rw [← Category.assoc]
      conv_rhs => rw [← hnat]
      rw [eqToHom_trans]

open CategoryTheory TopologicalSpace TopCat Opposite Limits

universe u
variable (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (A : ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
variable [(U : Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})) → Decidable (PUnit.unit ∈ U)]

    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app
          ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _
  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>
      have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hVbot).hom_ext _ _
    case pos =>
      have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU]
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV]
      have hnat := ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app
        ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).naturality i
      simp only [Functor.id_obj, Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
        Category.id_comp] at hnat
      have hmap : ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))

      rw [hmap, Category.assoc, ← hnat, ← Category.assoc, eqToHom_trans]

universe u

  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app
          ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _
  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>
      have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hVbot).hom_ext _ _
    case pos =>
      have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU]
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV]
      -- Don't simplify Functor.const_obj_obj at hnat to preserve the matching form
      have hnat := ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app
        ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).naturality i
      have hmap : ((constantSheaf J D).obj A).val.map i =
        ((presheafToSheaf J D ⋙ sheafToPresheaf J D).obj
          ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).map i := rfl
      rw [hmap, Category.assoc, ← hnat]

      simp only [Functor.id_obj, Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.const_obj_map, Category.id_comp]
      rw [← Category.assoc, eqToHom_trans]

import Mathlib
open CategoryTheory TopologicalSpace TopCat Opposite Limits

universe u
variable (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (A : ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
variable [(U : Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})) → Decidable (PUnit.unit ∈ U)]

noncomputable def beta :
    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app
          ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _
  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>
      have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hVbot).hom_ext _ _
    case pos =>
      have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, skyscraperPresheaf_map]
      have hnat := ((sheafificationAdjunction J D).unit.app
        ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).naturality i
      simp only [Functor.id_obj, Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
        Category.id_comp] at hnat
      rw [hnat]
      simp [eqToHom_trans_assoc]

import Mathlib
open CategoryTheory TopologicalSpace TopCat Opposite Limits

universe u
variable (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (A : ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
variable [(U : Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})) → Decidable (PUnit.unit ∈ U)]

noncomputable def alpha :
    (Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A ⟶
      skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A where
  app U := if h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop then eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h])
    else ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).from _
  naturality {U V} i := by
    simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, skyscraperPresheaf_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
      Category.id_comp]
    by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    · have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, eqToHom_trans]
    · apply ((if_neg hV).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).hom_ext

noncomputable def beta :
    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        (toSheafify J ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _
  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>
      have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hVbot).hom_ext _ _
    case pos =>
      have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, skyscraperPresheaf_map]
      have hnat := (toSheafify J ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).naturality i
      simp only [Functor.id_obj, Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
        Category.id_comp] at hnat
      rw [hnat]
      simp [eqToHom_trans_assoc]
      rfl

-- Verify α ≫ β = toSheafify
example : alpha kbar A ≫ beta kbar A =
    toSheafify (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
      ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A) := by
  apply NatTrans.ext
  funext U
  by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
  · simp [alpha, beta, h]
  · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
      rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
      · exact hbot
      · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
    apply (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A) hU).hom_ext

        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop

    rw [← Category.assoc, toSheafify_sheafifyLift, Category.comp_id]

import Mathlib
open CategoryTheory TopologicalSpace TopCat Opposite Limits

universe u
variable (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (A : ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
variable [(U : Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})) → Decidable (PUnit.unit ∈ U)]

noncomputable def alpha :
    (Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A ⟶
      skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A where
  app U := if h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop then eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h])
    else ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).from _
  naturality {U V} i := by
    simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, skyscraperPresheaf_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
      Category.id_comp]
    by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    · have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, eqToHom_trans]
    · apply ((if_neg hV).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).hom_ext

noncomputable def beta :
    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        (toSheafify J ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _
  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>
      have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hVbot).hom_ext _ _
    case pos =>
      have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, skyscraperPresheaf_map]
      have hnat := (toSheafify J
        ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).naturality i
      simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.const_obj_map, Category.id_comp] at hnat
      rw [hnat]
      simp [eqToHom_trans_assoc]
      rfl

-- Try alternate strategy: use change to align toSheafify forms
noncomputable example :
    skyscraperSheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
      (X := TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}) (PUnit.unit : PUnit.{u+1}) A ≅
    (constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
      (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let P : (Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ ⥤ D :=
    (Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  let SS := skyscraperSheaf (C := D) (X := TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}) (PUnit.unit : PUnit.{u+1}) A
  let fwd : CS ⟶ SS :=
    ⟨sheafifyLift _ (alpha kbar A) (skyscraperPresheaf_isSheaf _ _)⟩
  let inv : SS ⟶ CS := ⟨beta kbar A⟩
  have hαβ : alpha kbar A ≫ beta kbar A = toSheafify J P := by
    apply NatTrans.ext
    funext U
    by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · show (alpha kbar A).app U ≫ (beta kbar A).app U = (toSheafify J P).app U
      simp [alpha, beta, h]
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      apply (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).hom_ext
  refine
    { hom := inv
      inv := fwd
      hom_inv_id := ?_
      inv_hom_id := ?_ }
  · apply CategoryTheory.Sheaf.hom_ext
    apply NatTrans.ext
    funext U
    by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · show (beta kbar A).app U ≫ (sheafifyLift J (alpha kbar A) _).app U = _
      have htsl : toSheafify J P ≫ sheafifyLift J (alpha kbar A) (skyscraperPresheaf_isSheaf _ _) =
          alpha kbar A := toSheafify_sheafifyLift J (alpha kbar A) _
      have htslU := congrFun (congrArg NatTrans.app htsl) U
      show (beta kbar A).app U ≫ (sheafifyLift J (alpha kbar A)
          (skyscraperPresheaf_isSheaf _ _)).app U = _
      simp only [beta, h, dif_pos]
      rw [Category.assoc, htslU]
      simp [alpha, h]
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      apply (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty SS hU).hom_ext
  · apply CategoryTheory.Sheaf.hom_ext
    show sheafifyLift J (alpha kbar A) _ ≫ beta kbar A = 𝟙 _
    apply sheafify_hom_ext _ _ _ ((constantSheaf J D).obj A).property
    show toSheafify J P ≫ sheafifyLift J (alpha kbar A) _ ≫ beta kbar A =
      toSheafify J P ≫ 𝟙 _
    rw [← Category.assoc, toSheafify_sheafifyLift, Category.comp_id]
    exact hαβ

import Mathlib
open CategoryTheory TopologicalSpace TopCat Opposite Limits

universe u
variable (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (A : ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
variable [(U : Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})) → Decidable (PUnit.unit ∈ U)]

noncomputable def alpha :
    (Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A ⟶
      skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A where
  app U := if h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop then eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h])
    else ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).from _
  naturality {U V} i := by
    simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, skyscraperPresheaf_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
      Category.id_comp]
    by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    · have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, eqToHom_trans]
    · apply ((if_neg hV).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).hom_ext

noncomputable def beta :
    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        (toSheafify J ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _
  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>
      have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hVbot).hom_ext _ _
    case pos =>
      have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, skyscraperPresheaf_map]
      have hnat := (toSheafify J
        ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).naturality i
      simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.const_obj_map, Category.id_comp] at hnat
      rw [hnat]
      simp [eqToHom_trans_assoc]
      rfl

-- Maybe simpler: just include rfl after simp [beta, h]
lemma beta_app_pos {U : (Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ}
    (h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop) :
    (beta kbar A).app U = eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
      (toSheafify (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).app U := by
  simp only [beta, dif_pos h]
  rfl

  app U := if h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop then eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h])
    else ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).from _

    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫

      simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.const_obj_map, Category.id_comp] at hnat
      rw [hnat]
      simp [eqToHom_trans_assoc]
      rfl

lemma beta_app_pos {U : (Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ}
    (h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop) :
    (beta kbar A).app U = eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
      (toSheafify (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).app U := by
  simp only [beta, dif_pos h]
  rfl

lemma alpha_app_pos {U : (Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ}
    (h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop) :
    (alpha kbar A).app U = eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) := by

-- Verify α ≫ β = toSheafify
lemma alpha_comp_beta : alpha kbar A ≫ beta kbar A =

  app U := if h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop then eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h])
    else ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).from _
  naturality {U V} i := by
    simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, skyscraperPresheaf_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
      Category.id_comp]
    by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    · have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, eqToHom_trans]
    · apply ((if_neg hV).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).hom_ext

noncomputable def beta :
    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar

    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        (toSheafify J ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _
  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>
      have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hVbot).hom_ext _ _
    case pos =>
      have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, skyscraperPresheaf_map]
      have hnat := (toSheafify J
        ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).naturality i
      simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.const_obj_map, Category.id_comp] at hnat
      rw [hnat]
      simp [eqToHom_trans_assoc]
      rfl

noncomputable example :
    skyscraperSheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
      (X := TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}) (PUnit.unit : PUnit.{u+1}) A ≅
    (constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))

  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})

    (Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A

        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      apply (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).hom_ext
  refine
    { hom := inv
      inv := fwd
      hom_inv_id := ?_
      inv_hom_id := ?_ }
  · -- inv ≫ fwd = 𝟙_SS
    apply CategoryTheory.Sheaf.hom_ext

    funext U

    · -- compute via toSheafify ≫ sheafifyLift = α
      have htsl : toSheafify J P ≫ sheafifyLift J (alpha kbar A)
          (skyscraperPresheaf_isSheaf _ _) = alpha kbar A :=
        toSheafify_sheafifyLift J (alpha kbar A) _
      have htslU := congrFun (congrArg NatTrans.app htsl) U
      show (beta kbar A).app U ≫ (sheafifyLift J (alpha kbar A) _).app U = _
      simp [beta, h]
      rw [htslU]
      simp [alpha, h]
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      apply (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty SS hU).hom_ext
  · -- fwd ≫ inv = 𝟙_CS
    apply CategoryTheory.Sheaf.hom_ext
    show sheafifyLift J (alpha kbar A) _ ≫ beta kbar A = 𝟙 _
    apply sheafify_hom_ext _ _ _ CS.property
    rw [← Category.assoc, toSheafify_sheafifyLift, Category.comp_id]
    exact hαβ

  app U := if h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop then eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h])
    else ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).from _
  naturality {U V} i := by
    simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, skyscraperPresheaf_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
      Category.id_comp]

      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, eqToHom_trans]
    · apply ((if_neg hV).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).hom_ext

    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        (toSheafify J ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop

  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>

  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>

    change sheafifyLift J (alpha kbar A) _ ≫ beta kbar A = 𝟙 _
    apply sheafify_hom_ext _ _ _ CS.property
    rw [← Category.assoc, toSheafify_sheafifyLift]
    simp only [Category.comp_id]

    (Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A ⟶
      skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A where
  app U := if h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop then eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h])
    else ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).from _
  naturality {U V} i := by
    simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, skyscraperPresheaf_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
      Category.id_comp]
    by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    · have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, eqToHom_trans]
    · apply ((if_neg hV).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).hom_ext

    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})

  refine

      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫

    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop

import Mathlib
open CategoryTheory TopologicalSpace TopCat Opposite Limits

universe u
variable (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (A : ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
variable [(U : Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})) → Decidable (PUnit.unit ∈ U)]

noncomputable def alpha :
    (Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A ⟶
      skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A where
  app U := if h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop then eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h])
    else ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).from _
  naturality {U V} i := by
    simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, skyscraperPresheaf_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
      Category.id_comp]
    by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    · have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, eqToHom_trans]
    · apply ((if_neg hV).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).hom_ext

noncomputable def beta :
    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        (toSheafify J ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _
  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>
      have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hVbot).hom_ext _ _
    case pos =>
      have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, skyscraperPresheaf_map]
      have hnat := (toSheafify J
        ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).naturality i
      simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.const_obj_map, Category.id_comp] at hnat
      rw [hnat]
      simp [eqToHom_trans_assoc]
      rfl

import Mathlib
open CategoryTheory TopologicalSpace TopCat Opposite Limits

universe u
variable (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (A : ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
variable [(U : Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})) → Decidable (PUnit.unit ∈ U)]

noncomputable def alpha :
    (Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A ⟶
      skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A where
  app U := if h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop then eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h])
    else ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).from _
  naturality {U V} i := by
    simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, skyscraperPresheaf_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
      Category.id_comp]
    by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    · have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, eqToHom_trans]
    · apply ((if_neg hV).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).hom_ext

noncomputable def beta :
    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        (toSheafify J ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _
  · by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    case neg =>
      have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hVbot).hom_ext _ _
    case pos =>
      have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, skyscraperPresheaf_map]
      have hnat := (toSheafify J
        ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).naturality i
      simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.const_obj_map, Category.id_comp] at hnat
      rw [hnat]
      simp [eqToHom_trans_assoc]
      rfl

-- Use a key lemma about alpha ≫ beta
lemma alpha_beta_eq_toSheafify :
    alpha kbar A ≫ beta kbar A =
      toSheafify (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A) := by
  apply NatTrans.ext
  funext U
  by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
  · change (alpha kbar A).app U ≫ (beta kbar A).app U = _
    simp only [alpha, beta, dif_pos h]
    simp [eqToHom_trans_assoc]
  · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
      rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
      · exact hbot
      · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
    apply (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A) hU).hom_ext

noncomputable example :
    skyscraperSheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
      (X := TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}) (PUnit.unit : PUnit.{u+1}) A ≅
    (constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
      (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A := by
  refine
    { hom := ⟨beta kbar A⟩
      inv := ⟨sheafifyLift _ (alpha kbar A) (skyscraperPresheaf_isSheaf _ _)⟩
      hom_inv_id := ?_
      inv_hom_id := ?_ }
  · apply CategoryTheory.Sheaf.hom_ext
    apply NatTrans.ext
    funext U
    by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    case pos =>
      change (beta kbar A).app U ≫ (sheafifyLift _ (alpha kbar A) _).app U = _
      have hcomp : beta kbar A ≫ sheafifyLift
          (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})) (alpha kbar A)
          (skyscraperPresheaf_isSheaf _ _) = 𝟙 _ := by
        -- We need to show beta ≫ sheafifyLift α = 𝟙_skyscraperPresheaf as NatTrans
        apply NatTrans.ext
        funext V
        by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
        · change (beta kbar A).app V ≫ (sheafifyLift _ (alpha kbar A) _).app V = _
          have htsl := toSheafify_sheafifyLift
            (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
            (alpha kbar A) (skyscraperPresheaf_isSheaf _ _)
          have htslV := congrFun (congrArg NatTrans.app htsl) V
          simp only [beta, dif_pos hV]
          rw [Category.assoc]
          show eqToHom _ ≫ ((toSheafify _ _).app V ≫ _) = _
          rw [htslV]
          simp [alpha, hV]
        · have hVbot : V.unop = ⊥ := by
            rcases V.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
            · exact hbot
            · exfalso; apply hV; rw [htop]; trivial
          apply (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty
            (skyscraperSheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar)
              (X := TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}) (PUnit.unit : PUnit.{u+1}) A) hVbot).hom_ext
      exact congrFun (congrArg NatTrans.app hcomp) U
    case neg =>
      have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      apply (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty _ hU).hom_ext
  · apply CategoryTheory.Sheaf.hom_ext
    change sheafifyLift _ (alpha kbar A) _ ≫ beta kbar A = 𝟙 _
    apply sheafify_hom_ext _ _ _
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).property
    show toSheafify _ _ ≫ sheafifyLift _ (alpha kbar A) _ ≫ beta kbar A = toSheafify _ _ ≫ 𝟙 _
    rw [← Category.assoc, toSheafify_sheafifyLift, Category.comp_id]
    exact alpha_beta_eq_toSheafify kbar A

import Mathlib

universe u

variable [(U : Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})) → Decidable (PUnit.unit ∈ U)]

noncomputable def alpha :
    (Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A ⟶
      skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A where
  app U := if h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop then eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h])
    else ((if_neg h).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).from _
  naturality {U V} i := by
    simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, skyscraperPresheaf_obj, Functor.const_obj_map,
      Category.id_comp]
    by_cases hV : PUnit.unit ∈ V.unop
    · have hU : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop := i.unop.le hV
      simp only [skyscraperPresheaf_map, dif_pos hV, dif_pos hU, eqToHom_trans]
    · apply ((if_neg hV).symm.ndrec terminalIsTerminal).hom_ext

noncomputable def beta :
    skyscraperPresheaf (C := ModuleCat.{u} kbar) PUnit.unit A ⟶
      ((constantSheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))
        (ModuleCat.{u} kbar)).obj A).val := by
  let J := Opens.grothendieckTopology (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1})
  let D := ModuleCat.{u} kbar
  let CS := (constantSheaf J D).obj A
  refine
    { app := fun U => ?_
      naturality := fun {U V} i => ?_ }
  · by_cases h : PUnit.unit ∈ U.unop
    · exact eqToHom (by simp [skyscraperPresheaf, h]) ≫
        (toSheafify J ((Functor.const ((Opens (TopCat.of PUnit.{u+1}))ᵒᵖ)).obj A)).app U
    · have hU : U.unop = ⊥ := by
        rcases U.unop.eq_bot_or_top with hbot | htop
        · exact hbot
        · exfalso; apply h; rw [htop]; trivial
      exact (TopCat.Sheaf.isTerminalOfEqEmpty CS hU).from _

    case neg =>

    case pos =>

      have hnat := (toSheafify J

      simp only [Functor.const_obj_obj, Functor.const_obj_map, Category.id_comp] at hnat
      rw [hnat]
      simp [eqToHom_trans_assoc]
      rfl

/-! ## §2. Skyscraper sheaves are flasque -/

/-- **Skyscraper sheaf as pushforward of a constant sheaf** (Hartshorne
